title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: AWS Developers explains AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals in a beginner-friendly video. Coverage includes the bouncer mental model, users vs. roles vs. policies, least privilege principles, IAM Access Analyzer for permission discovery, and security best practices like never storing access keys in code.
